summary: Built the HR capability with scenario-based evaluation (rubric + 3 base scenarios, placeholder scores for Layer 1), structured handoff protocol (context packaging + formatted messages), onboarding validation (persona.yaml schema + directory structure checks), and staff-to-persona sync (diff detection for 3 employees, generates Zo persona API commands as dry-run). All 5 scenarios pass.
decisions: Evaluation uses placeholder score (0.7) in Layer 1 — LLM evaluation in Layer 2
Sync diff detects dirs even without persona.yaml (flags as needing setup)
Sync dry_run=True by default — no actual persona creation in Layer 1
broadcast: HR API: evaluate_scenario(employee, scenario) → EvalResult. diff_staff() → list[SyncAction]. prepare_handoff(from, to, summary) → HandoffPackage. validate_persona(dict) → ValidationResult.
